records.m_Talk_ENG: I smell something around here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I smell something around here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I smell something around here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A foul stench of an <color=#ffd34c>evil spirit</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A foul stench of an <color=#ffd34c>evil spirit</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A foul stench of an <color=#ffd34c>evil spirit</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Found it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Found it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Found it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this the last one?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this the last one?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this the last one?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've destroyed the Corrupted Wedge...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've destroyed the Corrupted Wedge...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've destroyed the Corrupted Wedge...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, these evil spirits won't trouble you anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, these evil spirits won't trouble you anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, these evil spirits won't trouble you anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can rest easy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can rest easy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can rest easy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, Sister. I don't know how we could ever repay you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, Sister. I don't know how we could ever repay you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, Sister. I don't know how we could ever repay you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only did what needed to be done.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only did what needed to be done.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only did what needed to be done.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But refusing a token of gratitude wouldn't be polite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But refusing a token of gratitude wouldn't be polite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But refusing a token of gratitude wouldn't be polite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, this is holy water to cleanse the land of evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, this is holy water to cleanse the land of evil spirits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, this is holy water to cleanse the land of evil spirits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The more you pour into the ground, the harder it will be for them to return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The more you pour into the ground, the harder it will be for them to return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The more you pour into the ground, the harder it will be for them to return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And of course, it's the real deal with the Lord's power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And of course, it's the real deal with the Lord's power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And of course, it's the real deal with the Lord's power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean... it's been personally blessed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean... it's been personally blessed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean... it's been personally blessed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. You can even drink it for its restorative effects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. You can even drink it for its restorative effects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. You can even drink it for its restorative effects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, it'll help reinvigorate a tired body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, it'll help reinvigorate a tired body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, it'll help reinvigorate a tired body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reinvigorate a tired body...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reinvigorate a tired body...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reinvigorate a tired body...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it, I have been feeling sluggish lately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it, I have been feeling sluggish lately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it, I have been feeling sluggish lately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take ten bottles!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take ten bottles!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take ten bottles!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll buy some too!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll buy some too!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll buy some too!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How many do you have? I want one as well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: How many do you have? I want one as well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: How many do you have? I want one as well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, don't push! You're crowding her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, don't push! You're crowding her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, don't push! You're crowding her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Enough!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Enough!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Enough!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How can you be this rude after she resolved the haunting that plagued us for weeks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How can you be this rude after she resolved the haunting that plagued us for weeks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How can you be this rude after she resolved the haunting that plagued us for weeks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I apologize for their behavior, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I apologize for their behavior, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I apologize for their behavior, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Truly, the fact that you came to us must be the Lord's way of watching over us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Truly, the fact that you came to us must be the Lord's way of watching over us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Truly, the fact that you came to us must be the Lord's way of watching over us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is by His guidance that I was led to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is by His guidance that I was led to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is by His guidance that I was led to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Inside these bottles is holy water imbued with His blessings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Inside these bottles is holy water imbued with His blessings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Inside these bottles is holy water imbued with His blessings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And with every generous offering you make, His blessings only grow stronger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And with every generous offering you make, His blessings only grow stronger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And with every generous offering you make, His blessings only grow stronger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what if something like this happens again after she leaves?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what if something like this happens again after she leaves?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what if something like this happens again after she leaves?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe we should just get one bottle, just in case...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe we should just get one bottle, just in case...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe we should just get one bottle, just in case...

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but asking for offerings in exchange for blessings... isn't that what cults do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but asking for offerings in exchange for blessings... isn't that what cults do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but asking for offerings in exchange for blessings... isn't that what cults do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think about it, I haven't received my payment yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think about it, I haven't received my payment yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think about it, I haven't received my payment yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For this job... this seems like a fair price.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For this job... this seems like a fair price.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For this job... this seems like a fair price.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Wait, when we first asked for your help, the fee was
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Wait, when we first asked for your help, the fee was
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Wait, when we first asked for your help, the fee was
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've added a contribution to your offering to the Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've added a contribution to your offering to the Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've added a contribution to your offering to the Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Money is nothing but a fleeting worry. True blessings come through offerings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Money is nothing but a fleeting worry. True blessings come through offerings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Money is nothing but a fleeting worry. True blessings come through offerings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, instead of taking your offerings, I'll distribute these bottles of holy water to everyone here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, instead of taking your offerings, I'll distribute these bottles of holy water to everyone here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, instead of taking your offerings, I'll distribute these bottles of holy water to everyone here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's what you meant... You truly are a saint, Sister.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's what you meant... You truly are a saint, Sister.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's what you meant... You truly are a saint, Sister.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... Frank said he heard the evil spirits crying just the other night.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... Frank said he heard the evil spirits crying just the other night.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... Frank said he heard the evil spirits crying just the other night.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we don't spread the holy water, they might come back...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we don't spread the holy water, they might come back...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we don't spread the holy water, they might come back...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad you've come to understand the Lord's will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad you've come to understand the Lord's will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you've come to understand the Lord's will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, I must go where His grace is needed next.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, I must go where His grace is needed next.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, I must go where His grace is needed next.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Lucia Ridge, the exorcist nun of the <color=#ffd34c>Valentinus Monastery</color>.
